email-verification.subject: Email verification for signing up to Cheappis
email-verification.main-body: You’re just one step away from completing your Cheappis sign‑up. To activate your account, please verify your email by clicking the button below:
email-verification.mistake-msg: If you didn’t create an account, you can safely ignore this message.
email-verification.thank-you: Thank you for joining Cheappis, <team>The Cheappis Team</team>
